Description: Confirm device is charged, updated, labeled, and ready for the data collection session.
Acceptance Criteria: Device powers on | Correct app/build is installed | Login is verified | Device ID is documented

Description: Review session checklist before data collection begins.
Acceptance Criteria: Session ID confirmed | Participant ID confirmed | Consent status confirmed | Scenario instructions confirmed | Collection protocol confirmed

Description: Conduct a scripted data collection scenario and record observations.
Acceptance Criteria: All required steps are completed | Timestamps are recorded | Any unusual behavior is documented

Description: Device froze during scenario step 4 and required restart.
Acceptance Criteria: Device ID recorded | Time of issue recorded | Steps to reproduce documented | Impact on session described | Whether data was usable is noted

Description: Review collected data for missing fields, incorrect labels, or formatting issues.
Acceptance Criteria: Required fields are complete | Naming convention is correct | Data is saved in the proper folder

Description: Compare session notes against collection protocol to ensure accuracy.
Acceptance Criteria: Notes are complete | Unclear items are flagged | Session is ready for final review

Description: Suggest adding a clearer troubleshooting step for device restart during session.
Acceptance Criteria: Suggestion explains the issue | Proposed change is described | Expected benefit is described

Description: Confirm session data and documentation are complete before closing the ticket.
Acceptance Criteria: Data file is complete | Session notes are complete | Issue log is complete | QA checklist is complete

Description: Charge and configure a backup prototype device so the session can continue if the primary device fails.
Acceptance Criteria: Backup device charged to at least 80% | Same app/build as primary is installed | Backup device ID documented and labeled | Login verified on backup device

Summary: Organize and back up session data
Description: After collection, move the session data into the correct folder structure and create a backup copy so the validated data is preserved.
Acceptance Criteria: Data filed under correct session/participant folder | File naming follows the convention | Backup copy stored in designated location | Backup confirmed to open and match original
